invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$0.0863（ATR止损），或融资费率转正（空头压力缓解），或Qlib分数大幅下降。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $0.0863 (ATR-based stop), or funding rate turns positive (short pressure eases), or Qlib score drops significantly.

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$76.5（ATR止损），或融资费率转正，或BTC跌破关键支撑。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $76.5 (ATR-based stop), or funding rate turns positive, or BTC breaks key support.
